name: skills
description: Personal agent skill collection: doc-feat-desc, git-smart-commit, work-hunt, work-think, work-check, work-design.

plugins.name: doc-feat-desc
plugins.description: Use when the user wants user-facing docs for an implemented feature. Inspect the real implementation first, then write help-center, site-copy, and in-product docs under doc/<requirement-name>.

plugins.name: git-smart-commit
plugins.description: Use when the user wants a git commit message or wants to refine one. Detect the repo's commit convention first, then generate a short commit header that matches the repo.

plugins.name: work-hunt
plugins.description: Invoke when debugging any error, crash, unexpected behavior, or failing test. Finds root cause before applying any fix. Not for code review or new features.

plugins.name: work-think
plugins.description: Invoke before writing any code for a new feature, design, or architecture decision. Turns rough ideas into approved plans with validated structure. Not for bug fixes or small edits.

plugins.name: work-check
plugins.description: Invoke after any implementation task completes or before merging. Reviews the diff, auto-fixes safe issues, runs specialist security and architecture reviewers on large diffs. Not for exploring ideas or debugging.

plugins.name: work-design
plugins.description: Invoke when building any UI, component, page, or visual interface. Produces distinctive design with a committed aesthetic, not generic defaults. Not for backend logic or data pipelines.
